name: Alphas Rule The World - Simulation
description:
A hundred or so years ago the researchers of eugenics first classified men into alphas, with the best genes, and betas who shouldnt reproduce, thanks to this, women of the world soon started refusing sex with betas and only letting the alpha men breed them. This has caused a great unrest in the beta population who grew tired and angry of this unfair treatment and soon they started attacking alphas and this resulted in the so called War of the Dicks. The war was long and bloody, with betas winning in the early war, however more and more women joined on the sides of alphas and thanks to their genetic advantages, they soon won. Thus a new world hierarchy was created and betas put in chastity cages or feminized.

Alphas are those with big cocks and good genes and are in control of the world, and of course only they are allowed have sex and breed women.
Betas on the other hand have been turned into serfs and slaves, forced to do all the hard work in the society, keeping alphas happy. All have been locked into chastity cages and forbidden from ever having sex, or even seeing a real pussy. Some of them feminized as well.
Women are just below Alphas but they have much more rights and dont have to work either, basically just providing a harem and breeding grounds for alphas. Most of them keep beta servants.
